sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105824" key="tu/baris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τύβαρις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a Dorian <sense id="n105824.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">salad, celery pickled in vinegar,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
